channel.title: ProbBrain - AI News Terminal
channel.description: AI lab announcements, arXiv papers, GitHub and HuggingFace trending, AI Hacker News, and independent writers - aggregated, deduped, and posted to @ProbBrain on Telegram.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Large Language Models as Unified Multimodal Learners for Clinical Prediction
item.description: Large Language Models as Unified Multimodal Learners for Clinical Prediction

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Verbalizable Representations Form a Global Workspace in Language Models
item.description: Verbalizable Representations Form a Global Workspace in Language Models

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] VarRate: Training-Free Variable-Rate KV Cache Compression for Long-Context LLMs
item.description: VarRate: Training-Free Variable-Rate KV Cache Compression for Long-Context LLMs

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] EpiNarrate: Agentic Generation of Grounded Narratives from Epidemiological Scenario Projections
item.description: EpiNarrate: Agentic Generation of Grounded Narratives from Epidemiological Scenario Projections

item.description: SkillCorpus: Consolidating and Evaluating the Open Skill Ecosystem for Real-World LLM Agents

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Process Reward Informed Tree Rollout for Effective Multi-Turn RL
item.description: Process Reward Informed Tree Rollout for Effective Multi-Turn RL

item.description: On the Structure of Address in Multi-Party Dialogue: From Discrete Labels to Continuous Levels

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Adaptive Multi-Step Lookahead Decoding for Diffusion Language Models
item.description: Adaptive Multi-Step Lookahead Decoding for Diffusion Language Models

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Better Starts, Better Ends: Bootstrapped Iterative Self-Reasoning Distillation for Compressed Reasoning
item.description: Better Starts, Better Ends: Bootstrapped Iterative Self-Reasoning Distillation for Compressed Reasoning

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Before the Action: Benchmarking LLMs on Prospective Hypothesis Discovery
item.description: Before the Action: Benchmarking LLMs on Prospective Hypothesis Discovery

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Cost-efficient generative AI summarization for scalable automated essay scoring in educational assessment
item.description: Cost-efficient generative AI summarization for scalable automated essay scoring in educational assessment

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] CAMMAR: Culture-Aware Matryoshka for Metaphorical Arabic Representations
item.description: CAMMAR: Culture-Aware Matryoshka for Metaphorical Arabic Representations

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Contextual Semantic Relevance Tracks fMRI BOLD Responses During Naturalistic Speech Comprehension
item.description: Contextual Semantic Relevance Tracks fMRI BOLD Responses During Naturalistic Speech Comprehension

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Conditional Reliability of Toxicity Signals for Multilingual and Code-Mixed Abuse Detection
item.description: Conditional Reliability of Toxicity Signals for Multilingual and Code-Mixed Abuse Detection

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] An MLIR-Based Compilation Method for Large Language Models
item.description: An MLIR-Based Compilation Method for Large Language Models

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] How Much Human Label Variation Does Formal Semantic Structure Explain?: Group-Level Effects and Item-Level Ceilings in NLI
item.description: How Much Human Label Variation Does Formal Semantic Structure Explain?: Group-Level Effects and Item-Level Ceilings in NLI

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] DECODEM: Data Extraction from Corporate Organizational Documents via Enhanced Methods
item.description: DECODEM: Data Extraction from Corporate Organizational Documents via Enhanced Methods

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Induction in Both Directions: A Mechanistic Analysis of In-Context Learning in Masked Diffusion Language Models
item.description: Induction in Both Directions: A Mechanistic Analysis of In-Context Learning in Masked Diffusion Language Models

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] From Plausible to Actionable: A Position on LLM Self-Explanations
item.description: From Plausible to Actionable: A Position on LLM Self-Explanations

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] BayesPO: Bayesian Prompt Optimization via Parallel-Tempered Gradient-Guided Discrete MCMC
item.description: BayesPO: Bayesian Prompt Optimization via Parallel-Tempered Gradient-Guided Discrete MCMC

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Candidate Attended Dialogue State Tracking Using BERT
item.description: Candidate Attended Dialogue State Tracking Using BERT

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Loop the Loopies!
item.description: Loop the Loopies!

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Frontier AI performance across the business disciplines: a case-grounded benchmark of knowledge work and analytical reasoning
item.description: Frontier AI performance across the business disciplines: a case-grounded benchmark of knowledge work and analytical reasoning

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Frontier Language Models Struggle to Copy: Text Can Be Better Viewed in 2D
item.description: Frontier Language Models Struggle to Copy: Text Can Be Better Viewed in 2D

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Controlling Implicit Shortcut Reliance in L2 Spoken English Auto-markers
item.description: Controlling Implicit Shortcut Reliance in L2 Spoken English Auto-markers

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Rate-Utility Frontiers for Language Encodings: Comparing Tokens, Bytes, and Pixels Under Controlled Linguistic Content
item.description: Rate-Utility Frontiers for Language Encodings: Comparing Tokens, Bytes, and Pixels Under Controlled Linguistic Content

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] ToolSciVer: Multimodal Scientific Claim Verification with Visual Tool Augmented Reinforcement Learning
item.description: ToolSciVer: Multimodal Scientific Claim Verification with Visual Tool Augmented Reinforcement Learning

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Empathy as Predictive Misalignment Tolerance: A Co-Regulation Framework and the Regime Structure of Dialogue Repair
item.description: Empathy as Predictive Misalignment Tolerance: A Co-Regulation Framework and the Regime Structure of Dialogue Repair

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Hidden in Thought: Transferable Chain-of-Thought Artifacts Induce Harmful Behavior
item.description: Hidden in Thought: Transferable Chain-of-Thought Artifacts Induce Harmful Behavior

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Looped Latent Attention: Cross-Loop KV Compression for Looped Transformers
item.description: Looped Latent Attention: Cross-Loop KV Compression for Looped Transformers

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Structure of the Circular-Dyadic Convolution Error
item.description: Substituting Hadamard transform for DFT in circular convolution introduces structured, predictable algebraic error governed by filter alignment and positioning.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Position: Quantum Program Generation Must Prioritize Validity Over Probabilistic Scaling
item.description: Quantum circuit generation requires verification-aware architectures encoding task-specific rules, not just scaling, because valid programs decay exponentially with more qubits.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] A Transportable Threshold-Based Framework for Interpretable Classification of Medical Data
item.description: Interpretable clinical classification framework using Bernoulli Naive Bayes with statistical binarization achieves performance comparable to complex models on benchmark datasets.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Regularity-Aware Stochastic MGDA with Adaptive Conflict-Avoidant Update Direction Control
item.description: Stochastic multi-objective learning method improves convergence rate from T^-1/4 to T^-1/2 by exploiting regularity conditions in conflict-avoidant gradient directions.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] AI Trading: Evaluating Large Language Models for Technical Market Analysis
item.description: Study evaluates five LLMs for technical market analysis; GPT-4 Turbo and FinGPT outperform S&P 500 but exhibit persistent failure modes.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] qZACH-ViT: Quantization-Aware Intrinsic Explanations with Recursive Attribution-Stabilized Optimization
item.description: Researchers develop qZACH-ViT, a quantized medical image classifier achieving 99.975% prediction agreement with the original model while maintaining interpretability through RASO optimization.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] From hyperplanes to hyperellipsoids: characterizing the inherent interpretability of linear and single-qubit mixed-state binary classification models
item.description: Research shows single-qubit mixed-state models classify via hyperellipsoids rather than hyperplanes, clarifying quantum machine learning's relationship to classical linear models.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Stochastic Reset Pathfinding: Path-Level Regret for Cascading Bandits over Graph Paths
item.description: Stochastic Reset Pathfinding introduces path-level regret analysis for learning routes in graphs with unreliable edges across quantum networks and mesh systems.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Who Became Financially Vulnerable After COVID-19? A Population-Level Machine Learning Analysis Using MEPS Data
item.description: Who Became Financially Vulnerable After COVID-19? A Population-Level Machine Learning Analysis Using MEPS Data

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] LLM4EHR: Aligning Clinical Time Series with Medical Event Sequences via Large Language Models
item.description: LLM4EHR: Aligning Clinical Time Series with Medical Event Sequences via Large Language Models

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Relevant and Irrelevant: A Renormalization Group Analysis of Transformer Attention
item.description: Relevant and Irrelevant: A Renormalization Group Analysis of Transformer Attention

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Looped Latent Attention: Cross-Loop KV Compression for Looped Transformers
item.description: Looped Latent Attention: Cross-Loop KV Compression for Looped Transformers

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Robust Peak-cost Constrained Reinforcement Learning
item.description: Robust Peak-cost Constrained Reinforcement Learning

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] ADS-C: Antidistillation Sampling for Classification
item.description: ADS-C: Antidistillation Sampling for Classification

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Deep Learning Approaches for Sleep Apnea Classification from Polysomnographic EEG Signals
item.description: Deep Learning Approaches for Sleep Apnea Classification from Polysomnographic EEG Signals

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Inpainting Insights: Elevating Visual XAI with Photorealistic Perturbations
item.description: Inpainting Insights: Elevating Visual XAI with Photorealistic Perturbations

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Diffusion models recover accurate mixture weights despite score function insensitivity
item.description: Diffusion models recover accurate mixture weights despite score function insensitivity

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] An Auto-Scaling Approach for Serverless Environments Based on a Multi-Expert Consensus Mechanism
item.description: An Auto-Scaling Approach for Serverless Environments Based on a Multi-Expert Consensus Mechanism

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Cache-Aware Prompt Compression:A Two-Tier Cost Model for LLM API Caching
item.description: Cache-Aware Prompt Compression:A Two-Tier Cost Model for LLM API Caching

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Recursive Harness Self-Improvement
item.description: Recursive Harness Self-Improvement

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Kolmogorov--Arnold Networks for Small Language Models
item.description: Kolmogorov--Arnold Networks for Small Language Models

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Publicly-Verifiable Certificates for Statistical Algorithms
item.description: Publicly-Verifiable Certificates for Statistical Algorithms

item.description: From Feasibility to Desirability: Plan, Learn, Adapt (PLA) Framework for Personalized On-Device Itinerary Generation

item.description: Hard Rules, Soft Preferences: Bridging Reasoning, Learning, and Optimization for Personalized Packing Checklist Generation

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Information-Directed Sampling for Causal Bandits
item.description: Information-Directed Sampling for Causal Bandits

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Rethinking Transfer in Continual Learning: A Replay-Based Realisation
item.description: Rethinking Transfer in Continual Learning: A Replay-Based Realisation

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Field-Aware RankMixer with Dual-Stream Bilinear Fusion for the Tencent UNI-REC Challenge
item.description: Field-Aware RankMixer with Dual-Stream Bilinear Fusion for the Tencent UNI-REC Challenge

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Do Generative Models Keep Time? A Time-Aware Evaluation of Synthetic Sequential Tabular Data
item.description: Do Generative Models Keep Time? A Time-Aware Evaluation of Synthetic Sequential Tabular Data

item.description: ASK-NN: An Asymmetric Nearest-Neighbor Test that detects Distribution Drifts in Natural Language
